name: Scholiq
summary: Open-source LVS + LMS for Nextcloud — student tracking, course creation, certification, and compliance training.
goal: Scholiq combines a leerlingvolgsysteem (LVS) for primary, secondary, and higher education with a leeromgeving / LMS for corporate L&D and government employee training. v0.1 wedge ships compliance-audit (NIS2, BIO2, AVG) for Dutch corporate and government buyers; later phases add K-12 (BRON/UWLR/OSO/Edukoppeling/SchoolID/ECK iD), higher education (SURFconext, Studielink, OOAPI), and full assessment authoring (IMS QTI 3.0 + EDCI/Open Badges 3.0 credentials).
author: Conduction B.V.

adrs.title: Content runtime: cmi5 + xAPI primary, SCORM compatibility shim
EU AI Act compliance gate: feature-flag + mandatory audit trail per AI decision
Immutable audit trail as architectural foundation
